title: Don't fail copy to emptydir
body: pick f379c5c2 Don't fail copy to emptydir

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.19/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@TomSweeneyRedHat @nalind @terceiro any idea why these are failing?
I don't know the why's, but a conformance test is failing a .dockerignore test, which I think is coming from the copy to emptydir PR that I've yet to chase down.

There are several tests that are failing for this on the main branch now.

Basically dockerignore checks were expecting to fail when the directory exists, but all of the contents of the directory are blocked by .dockerignore.  The change in your PR causes these tests to no longer fail.
This breaks conformance with Docker, closing.
